gist.headline: A new friend in the greenhouse
gist.blurb: Neuro Mate just landed in the community showcase! It's an Android app for AI roleplay with characters that actually remember you.
gist.summary: Added Neuro Mate, an Android-based AI roleplay chat app featuring characters with long-term memory, to the community showcase.
gist.impact: Community members can now discover Neuro Mate in the apps directory and explore its pollinations-powered roleplay features.
gist.visual_concept: Neuro Mate is an Android app for AI roleplay and chat. Visuals should include a smartphone, chat bubbles, and the pollinations bee interacting with a new robot/character friend, representing the AI companion.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot holding a tiny smartphone with glowing chat bubbles coming out of it. A friendly pixel robot character stands nearby, representing an AI roleplay companion. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
